summary: Audit & Logging | Audits | Search by Game PK
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Audit & Logging" tile on the homepage or the side nav
And the user clicks on the "Resource Tag" button
And the user select and enters a valid Game PK in the Game PK input field
For example: 831644
And the user presses Enter or clicks on the magnifying glass
And !xray-attachment://33d76d9f-5751-4233-9b41-dfcc89dfa1a3|width=1645,height=737!
Then the user should land on the "Audits" page
And the user sees "Game PK" and "Media ID" buttons
And the entered Game PK should appear in the input field
And upon submission, a list of logs associated with that Game PK should appear
And the logs should be shown in a table with the following column headers:
-Source System
-Operation
-Instigator
-Email
-Created At
-Trace ID
-Event Data
-Resource Tags

steps.action:
